M2440_NH_THERAPY M2440 (M0900) Nursing Home Reason- Therapy Services This field indicates the reason the patient was admitted to a nursing home was for therapy services. 0 = Not Checked, 1 = Checked CHAR 1 x
M2440_NH_UK M2440 (M0900) Nursing Home Reason- Unknown This field indicates the reason the patient was admitted to a nursing home was for unknown reasons. 0 = Not Checked, 1 = Checked CHAR 1
